title: senecio subculcitioides
intro: Senecio subculcitioides, also known as Groundsel, is a flowering plant native to the mountainous regions of the United States, particularly in the western and central parts of the country. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to treat respiratory issues and coughs due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Senecio subculcitioides include relieving congestion, reducing fever, and soothing sore throats, making it a popular ingredient in herbal remedies for colds and flu. Herbal preparations of Senecio subculcitioides include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat various health conditions, although it is essential to consult with a healthcare professional before using it for medicinal purposes.
